summary: Completed backend API testing for Teacher Mobile App. All 16 tests passed (100%). All teacher-specific endpoints are functioning correctly.

minor.issue: Only works for students (uses student_id filter). Teachers should use POST /api/notifications/mark-all-read instead (uses user_id)

action_items: Consider fixing PUT /api/notifications/read-all to work for all user types (not just students) - LOW priority
critical_code_review_comments: All teacher APIs work correctly: login, courses, enrollments, lectures, notifications, attendance sync
Teacher login correctly returns role='teacher' for frontend validation
GET /api/courses correctly returns 1 course for teacher: مقرر اختبار 180156
GET /api/enrollments/{course_id}/students returns 5 enrolled students as expected
POST /api/sync/attendance correctly syncs offline attendance records
PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read works correctly for marking individual notifications
NOTE: PUT /api/notifications/read-all has student-only logic, use POST /api/notifications/mark-all-read for teachers

success_rate.frontend: N/A (backend only testing requested - Teacher App is React Native)

seed_data_creation: Lectures created during testing (date: current day, time: 14:00-15:30)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All teacher backend APIs pass. Test course: 698f671431cfba92c49a550d (مقرر اختبار 180156) with 5 enrolled students. Teacher has 5 notifications (4 unread). Sync/attendance endpoint works with {attendance_records: [{course_id, student_id, status, date, method, local_id}]} format. Today's lecture exists (10:00-11:30). Additional test lectures created. Backend timezone is Yemen (UTC+3).
